List of Keywords
Apartment Buyer Agreement; Cancellation of the allotment; Earnest 
money; Refund of money; Forfeiture of earnest money; Unfair and 
unreasonable contract; Unfair trade practice; Section 74 of the 
Contract Act, 1872; Section 2(46) of Consumer Protection Act, 
2019; Section 2(1)(r) of Consumer Protection Act, 1986.
